steps.content: Whales travel between 72 and 77 miles per day, so the daily range is $72 \le d \le 77$.
Over 16 days, total miles $x = 16d$. Multiply all parts of the inequality by 16 (positive, so signs unchanged): $72 \times 16 \le x \le 77 \times 16$.

• $72+16 \le x \le 77+16$: Adds 16 instead of multiplying — wrong operation.
  • $\left(72\right) \left(16\right) \le x \le \left(77\right) \left(16\right)$: $(72)(16) \le x \le (77)(16)$ — matches our result. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
  • $72 \le 16+x \le 77$: $72 \le 16 + x \le 77$ — subtracts 16 from $x$, which doesn't represent total distance.
  • D: $72 \le 16x \le 77$ — divides by 16 instead of multiplying, giving a tiny range.
